title: Filesystem Core Services
description: PuterFS module, mountpoint management, locking, resource tracking, and size accounting

classes.name: PuterFSModule
responsibilities: Registers ResourceService, SizeService, MountpointService via services.registerService()
Creates and registers a RuntimeModule named 'fs' exposing capabilities, selectors, FSNodeContext, PuterPath, lock modes, resource constants, UploadProgressTracker

classes.name: BaseService
classes.note: Base for all services; provides lifecycle hooks _construct/_init, logging, error reporting

classes.name: MountpointService
boot_logic: Emits 'create.filesystem-types' event to allow external registration of filesystem types
Calls mounter.mount({path, options}) for each configured mountpoint
Emits 'filesystem.ready' with list of mounted paths
get_provider_logic: Single mountpoint fast-path: returns only provider directly
NodeChildSelector → delegates to get_provider(selector.path) or get_provider(selector.parent)

classes.name: FSLockService
methods: async lock_child(path, name, mode): Promise — delegates to lock_path(path/name, mode)
async lock_path(path, mode): Promise — creates RWLock if absent, calls rlock() or wlock()

classes.name: SizeService
methods: _init(): void — gets DB_WRITE handle via services.get('database').get(DB_WRITE, 'filesystem')
async get_usage(user_id): number — SELECT SUM(size) FROM fsentries WHERE user_id=?
async change_usage(user_id, delta): void — get_usage + delta
async add_node_size(fs, node, user, factor=1): void — computes size then calls change_usage
async add_storage(user_or_id, amount_in_bytes, reason, {field_a, field_b}): void
add_storage_logic: Writes audit row to storage_audit table

classes.name: ResourceService
methods: register(entry): ResourceEntry — stores entry by uid/path, attaches freePromise
free(uid): void — deletes entry, resolves freePromise via entry.free()
async waitForResource(selector): void — dispatches by selector type (NodePathSelector, NodeUIDSelector, NodeInternalIDSelector, NodeChildSelector)
classes.note: Simple intra-server write consistency: callers wait on freePromise before reading a resource being written

classes.name: UserParameter
methods: static async adapt(value): UserObject — if object return as-is; if number query by id; if string query by username

relationships: PuterFSModule uses MODE_READ, MODE_WRITE from FSLockService (imported constants)
PuterFSModule creates RuntimeModule and registers fs exports
FSLockService depends_on RWLock (composition via locks map)
MountpointService depends_on Mounter.mount() interface (duck-typed filesystem providers)
ResourceService depends_on selector types: NodePathSelector, NodeUIDSelector, NodeInternalIDSelector, NodeChildSelector

key_interfaces.ResourceEntry: { uid, path?, status, freePromise, free(), onFree() }

important_notes: FSLockService uses Symbol-based lock modes (MODE_READ, MODE_WRITE) — not strings
MountpointService mounts filesystems during 'boot.consolidation' phase; emits 'filesystem.ready'
SizeService caches user usages in-memory (this.usages) but reads DB on each get_usage call
ResourceService is intra-server only — not distributed locking
RWLock auto-deletes from locks map via on_empty_ callback when no active locks remain
MountpointService default mount: '/' → puterfs (configurable via config.mountpoints)
add_node_size supports factor param (e.g. -1 to subtract size on delete)
